Title: Valid Login
Steps:
Navigate to login page
Type user_name and password 
Click on Sign In button

Title: Invalid Credentials
Steps:
Navigate to login page
Type invalid_user_name and invalid_password 
Click on Sign In button
Expected: User see login form validation errors

Title: Dashboard Page
Steps: Login to platform with regular user credentials
Expected:
Left menu pannel is visible
Top right account icon is visible
Last 7 days sales chart visible
Last 24 hours sales chart is visible
Failed items list is visible
Month's Top Sellers list is visible

Title: Logout From Platform
Steps:
Click on account icon at top right
Click Logout button
Expected: User is logged out and redirected to login page

Title: View Store List
Steps:
Login to platform
Navigate to Store page from left menu
Search "RedLobster" store
Expected:
List of stores is displayed with store details
Shows details of all 5 "RedLobster" stores

Title: Edit Existing Store
Steps:
Navigate to Store page
Select the first store from the list
Click Edit
Modify store information (e.g. Name)
Click Save button

Title: Create New Store
Preconditions: User logged in with required permissions
Steps:
Step Description:
Navigate to Store page
Expected Result:
Verify that store page opened
Step Description:
Click Create Store button
Expected Result:
Verify that create Store form is visible
Step Description:
Fill required store details
Expected Result:
Verivy that all fields has values
Step Description:
Click Save button
Expected Result:
Verify that new store is added into the top of the list
Expected: New store is created and appears in store list
